lyrics.text: It's been so long
lyrics.translation: 已经如此之久

lyrics.text: That I haven't seen your face
lyrics.translation: 我没有见过你的面容

lyrics.text: I'm tryna' be strong
lyrics.translation: 我试着坚强

lyrics.text: But the strength I have is washing away
lyrics.translation: 但是渐渐地力不从心

lyrics.text: It won't be long before I get you by my side
lyrics.translation: 过不了多久你就会回到我身边

lyrics.text: And just hold you, tease you, squeeze you til
lyrics.translation: 然后抱着你，吻着你，压着你

lyrics.text: What's been on my mind
lyrics.translation: 脑海里想的全是你

lyrics.text: I wanna make up right now na na
lyrics.translation: 我想和你和好，就现在，现在，现在

lyrics.text: I wanna make up right now na na
lyrics.translation: 我想和你和好，就现在，现在，现在

lyrics.text: Wish we never broke up right now na na
lyrics.translation: 希望我们现在不分手，以后也不分手

lyrics.text: Girl, I know mistakes were made between us two

lyrics.text: And we show our eyes that now even says somethings were true
lyrics.translation: 彼此真诚地吐露心声

lyrics.text: Why'd you go and haven't seen my girl since then

lyrics.text: Why can it be the way it was
lyrics.translation: 为什么还一如既往

lyrics.text: 'Cause you were my homie lover friend
lyrics.translation: 因为你曾经是我的挚爱
